name: Product Demo
description: Standard product demonstration template with intro, demo, and CTA sections

intro.content: Hook the viewer with a problem statement or compelling question

demo.content: Show the product in action, highlight key features

benefits.content: Summarize the main benefits and transformation

cta.content: Clear call to action with urgency

exampleScript: Are you tired of [problem]? Introducing [product] - the solution that [benefit]. Watch how easy it is to [action]. In just minutes, you'll [transformation]. Join thousands who've already made the switch. Get started today with our special offer.
